ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-15-2010 Continued To Mar-29-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Caroline Hinshaw for and with Carol Aleo (Beneficiary). Joseph Corey for Beldean Bartlett (Executor).

Counsel addressed the issues raised in the Examiner's notes and Ms. Hinshaw's concerns with regard to proration of taxes, distribution of the Grass Valley house, payment for Terry's mortgage, the value of the horse, statutory fees, expenses, the reserve for federal tax deficiencies and forgiveness of the mortgage of Wyatt's property in San Francisco. Mr. Corey will revise the schedule with regard to the tax prorations, and work with the Examiner with regard to categorizing Terry's mortgage, the horse issue and losses. The matter was continued to March 29, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court will sign an order shortening time on the amended petition. The account is to go through the last date of the latest bank statements. Ms. Hinshaw is to put any objections in writing by March 24, 2010.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.
